welcome.title:
play.
return it.
play again.
welcome.sub: sports gear everywhere in your city. instant, free, in your pocket.

intro_map.title:
stations
near you
intro_map.sub: ball, racket, net — all within walking distance.

intro_social.title:
keep a streak
with friends
intro_social.sub: weekly city leaderboards. follow, beat, flex.

perms.title: a few permissions

location.title: location
location.why: to show nearby stations and unlock the gate

camera.title: camera
camera.why: to QR-scan at the station — you can also tap it on the map

perms.denied_optional: denied — that's fine, you can change it later
perms.optional_hint: you can play without notifications or camera.

phone.title: your phone?
phone.sub: we'll send you a verification code via sms.
phone.send_failed: couldn't send the code, try again

handle.title: what should we call you?
handle.sub: you can skip this and edit it later in settings.

payments.title: payments
payments.add_sub: for auto-charging when a session ends
payments.remove_msg: this card will be removed. you'll need to add a new one before starting a session.
payments.history_empty:
no payments yet.
your first session will show up here.

tour.title: how does it work?
tour.sub: play and return in four steps — see it once, know it always.

grab.title: grab it
grab.desc: gate's open. take the gear and head to the court.

play.title: play
play.desc: your timer's running. every minute counts.

ping.title: we'll ping you
ping.desc: your phone buzzes before time's up. keep an eye on the clock.

return.title: return on time
return.desc: drop the gear back, intact, before time's up. late or missing pieces = extra fee.

empty.no_reservations_sub: tap a station, lock it, play.

return.title: end session
return.confirm_sub: if you couldn't close it, you may be charged extra. contact support if there's an issue.

tips.check_station: make sure the station is open
tips.photo_return: point camera at QR when returning

empty.title: no active session
empty.sub: borrow something from a station nearby

account.phone_change_msg: to change your number, email our support team. for security, this can't be done in-app.
account.signout_msg: you'll be logged out — your data stays safe.
account.delete_msg: this can't be undone. all sessions and friends will be deleted.

station.not_found_sub: this station is no longer available

steps.scan_qr: scan the qr at the station

station.duration_question: how long do you want to play?
station.duration_hint: pick in minutes. you'll be billed when the session ends.
station.range_hint: get closer to the station to unlock
station.range_hint_reserve: you're far — reserve it so it's waiting for you
station.reserved_msg: {{name}} is locked for you for {{min}} min. don't be late.
station.reserve_err_has_active: you already have an active reservation.
station.reserve_err_cooldown: you reserved this station recently. wait a bit.
station.blocked_by_reservation: you have an active reservation at {{name}}. use it first.
station.blocked_session_here: you've got an active session at this station. jump to the play tab to continue.
station.blocked_session_elsewhere: you have an active session at {{name}}. end that one first.

review.title: session complete
review.subtitle: good run. here's the breakdown.
review.feedback_hint: pick a face — help us improve
review.share_msg: just played {{minutes}} min of {{sport}} at {{station}} 💪 — playbox

session.title: what went wrong?
session.sub: tell us in a few words — we'll do better next time.

app.title: trouble with the app?
app.sub: tell us what happened — we'll fix it.

bad.message_placeholder: a short note helps us a lot

app_prompt.title: rate playbox
app_prompt.sub: your thoughts matter to us — care to share?

reservations.cancel_msg: your reservation at {{name}} will be removed.

slides.body_1: we hold the gate at your station for 30 minutes. take your time — on the way, grabbing coffee, in line, doesn't matter. nobody else can take it until you arrive.
slides.body_2: we place a temporary ₺{{amount}} hold on your card when you reserve. it's released the moment you scan in. your money stays yours.
slides.body_3: if you don't arrive within 30 minutes, the held amount is captured. that's how we protect everyone else's chance to play.
slides.title_4: free cancel in the first 2 minutes
slides.body_4: changed your mind? cancel within the first 2 minutes and nothing is charged — the hold is released immediately.
slides.agree_label: i've read and accept the terms above.

mini_confirm.summary: Hold: ₺{{amount}} • Lock: {{min}} min • Free cancel in first 2 min

errors.preauth_failed: couldn't start the reservation, try again in a moment.
errors.has_active_reservation: you already have an active reservation.
errors.velocity_hour: you've hit the hourly reservation limit. wait a bit.
errors.velocity_day: you've hit the daily reservation limit. try again tomorrow.
errors.terms_required: you must accept the terms to continue.
errors.network: lost connection. check your internet and try again.
errors.gate_mismatch: this reservation is for a different gate. scan the right one.
errors.capture_failed: we couldn't charge your card. update it and try again.
errors.insert_failed: couldn't save the reservation, try again.
errors.retry_failed: card declined again — try a different card.

lock_banner.tier_24h_sub: you missed a few reservations. unlocks in {{remaining}}.
lock_banner.tier_7d_sub: you keep not showing up. new reservations unlock in {{remaining}}.
lock_banner.payment_failed_sub: we couldn't charge a previous reservation. update your card, then retry.

notif.t5_body: your reservation is about to expire. on your way?
notif.captured_body: you didn't arrive in time, the held amount was charged.
notif.released_body: a system issue occurred. nothing was charged.
notif.capture_failed_body: we couldn't charge a previous reservation. please update your card.
notif.tier_lock_body: you missed a few reservations. new reservations are paused for {{hours}} hours.

add.title: add a card
add.sub: stored securely by iyzico. you can remove it any time.

post_session.title: add a card for next time
post_session.sub: this session is on us. save a card to start in one tap next time. remove it whenever.

blocking.title:
add a card
before you start
blocking.sub: stored securely via iyzico. 3d secure confirmation comes from your bank.
blocking.detail: a temporary ₺{{amount}} hold is placed at start. released when you return on time, captured if you are late.

preauth_failed.title: card not approved
preauth_failed.sub: your bank declined this transaction. try another card or call your bank and retry.

error.network: connection lost. check your internet and retry.
error.bad_response: unexpected response from the server. please retry.
error.supabase_not_configured: payment service is not ready yet. try again shortly.
error.card_declined: card was declined by your bank. try another card.
error.card_invalid: check the card details and try again.
